subject: Setting up SSO with Google Workspace
description: I'd like to log in to BrightFox with my Google Workspace account. Can you walk me through enabling SSO?

subject: Importing existing contacts via CSV
description: We have a contact list in a spreadsheet. What format does the CSV importer expect for the email and tag columns?

subject: Connecting the booking form to BrightFox
description: My studio booking form is on Webflow. Is there a native integration or do I route it through a webhook?

subject: Billing: switching to annual plan
description: I'm on monthly and want to move to the annual Studio plan. Will the proration show on the next invoice?

subject: Custom fields not appearing on new records
description: I added two custom fields under settings but they aren't showing when I create a new record.

subject: Inviting a teammate with view-only access
description: I want to give a collaborator read-only access during onboarding. Which role should I assign?

subject: Webhook returning 401 on enquiry events
description: Our enquiry-form events are hitting BrightFox but the response is 401. The signing secret looks correct.

subject: Mapping Segment events into BrightFox
description: We route enquiry-form events through Segment. How do we map the track call properties to BrightFox fields?

subject: Exporting a full data backup
description: For our records I'd like a one-time export of all records and notes. Is there a self-serve option?

subject: API key scopes for read access
description: I'm building a small dashboard and need a read-only API key. Which scopes cover records and events?

subject: Two-factor authentication for the team
description: Can I require 2FA for everyone on the account, and is authenticator-app support available?

subject: Workshop sign-up list not syncing
description: Our class registrations from the arts center site aren't appearing under the linked list. Last sync was two days ago.

subject: Renaming the default pipeline stages
description: I'd like to rename the onboarding pipeline stages to match my own workflow. Does that break existing records?

subject: Adding a second sandbox environment
description: We want a sandbox to test the new webhook before pushing it live. Is that included on our plan?

subject: Best practice for onboarding email cadence
description: Is there a recommended default cadence for the onboarding email sequence, or should I build it from scratch?
